data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="氯化钠溶解性实验" goal="探究氯化钠在蒸馏水中的溶解性及其溶解过程的现象" difficulty="Normal" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="beaker_1" type="beaker" capacity="100ml" />
      <Component id="graduated_cylinder_1" type="graduated_cylinder" capacity="25ml" />
      <Component id="stirring_rod_1" type="stirring_rod" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="Distilled_Water" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="Sodium_Chloride" state="solid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      <Add vessel="beaker_1" reagent="H2O" volume="10 mL" tool="graduated_cylinder_1" id="step_0" />
      <Add vessel="beaker_1" reagent="NaCl" mass="2 g" id="step_1" />
      <Insert tool="stirring_rod_1" vessel="beaker_1" id="step_2" />
      <Stir vessel="beaker_1" id="step_3" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_4" />
      <Add vessel="beaker_1" reagent="NaCl" mass="2 g" id="step_5" />
      <Stir vessel="beaker_1" id="step_6" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_7" />
      <Add vessel="beaker_1" reagent="H2O" volume="10 mL" tool="graduated_cylinder_1" id="step_8" />
      <Stir vessel="beaker_1" id="step_9" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_10" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 量取蒸馏水并加入烧杯，首次加入氯化钠，插入玻璃棒，搅拌并静置，观察溶解现象。
再次加入氯化钠，搅拌并静置，观察是否有未溶解的固体，探究溶解度极限。
继续加入蒸馏水，搅拌并静置，观察剩余固体是否溶解，进一步理解溶解过程。
